member.name: T:TokenRelationship
member.summary:
Token's information related to the given Account.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: P:TokenRelationship.Balance
member.summary:
For token of type FUNGIBLE_COMMON - the balance that the Account holds in the smallest denomination.
For token of type NonFungibleUnique - the number of NFTs held by the account

member.name: P:TokenRelationship.KycStatus
member.summary:
The KYC status of the account (KycNotApplicable, Granted or Revoked).
If the token does not have KYC key, KycNotApplicable is returned

member.name: M:TokenRelationship.#ctor(TokenId,System.String,System.UInt64,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.UInt32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: The Freeze status of the account (FreezeNotApplicable, Frozen or Unfrozen). If the token does not have Freeze key, FreezeNotApplicable is returned

member.name: M:TokenRelationship.#ctor(TokenId,System.String,System.UInt64,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.UInt32,System.Boolean)_2
member.summary: The amount of decimal places that this token supports.

member.name: M:TokenRelationship.#ctor(TokenId,System.String,System.UInt64,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.UInt32,System.Boolean)_3
member.summary: Specifies if the relationship is created implicitly. False : explicitly associated, True : implicitly associated.

member.name: M:TokenRelationship.KycStatusFromProtobuf(Proto.TokenKycStatus)
member.summary: Retrieve the kyc status from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenRelationship.FreezeStatusFromProtobuf(Proto.TokenFreezeStatus)
member.summary: Retrieve freeze status from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenRelationship.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a token relationship from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TokenRelationship.FromProtobuf(Proto.TokenRelationship)
member.summary: Create a token relationship object from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenRelationship.KycStatusToProtobuf(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Retrieve the kyc status from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenRelationship.FreezeStatusToProtobuf(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Retrieve the freeze status from a protobuf.
